& & Acc.\ (\%) & $\downarrow$drop & Acc.\ (\%) & $\downarrow$drop & ROUGE-L & $\downarrow$drop & (GB) \\

  & BF16 Baseline  & \textbf{19.0} & —     & \textbf{87.5} & —     & 0.0616 & —       & 15.3 \\
  & KV-Quant 4-bit & 19.0          & 0.0\% & 87.5          & 0.0\% & 0.0620 & +0.6\%\textsuperscript{$\uparrow$} & 15.3 \\

  & BF16 Baseline  & —             & —     & —             & —     & —      & —       & — \\

  & GPTQ 4-bit     & —             & —     & —             & —     & —      & —       & — \\

\begin{tablenotes}

\end{table*}


% ── Table 2: Throughput Comparison ──────────────────────────────
\begin{table}[t]
\centering
\caption{Inference throughput (tokens/sec) and average latency per sample
across benchmarks. Evaluated on NVIDIA RTX PRO 6000 Blackwell (102 GB VRAM).}
\label{tab:throughput}
\small
\begin{tabular}{llccc}
\toprule
\textbf{Model} & \textbf{Method} & \textbf{GSM8K} & \textbf{BoolQ} & \textbf{MS MARCO} \\
               &                 & (tok/s)        & (tok/s)        & (tok/s) \\
\midrule
\multirow{2}{*}{Qwen3-8B}
  & BF16 Baseline  & 59.4 & 54.9 & 58.9 \\
  & KV-Quant 4-bit & 59.4 & 53.7 & 57.5 \\
\midrule
Phi-4-Mini & KV-Quant 4-bit & 96.9 & 75.6 & 93.9 \\
\bottomrule
\end{tabular}
\end{table}

% ── Table 4: Dataset Summary ─────────────────────────────────────
\begin{table}[t]
\centering
\caption{Evaluation benchmarks used in this study.}
\label{tab:benchmarks}
\small
\begin{tabular}{llll}
\toprule
\textbf{Benchmark} & \textbf{Language} & \textbf{Task} & \textbf{Metric} \\
\midrule
GSM8K~\cite{cobbe2021gsm8k}         & English & Math reasoning    & Acc.\ (EM) \\
BoolQ~\cite{clark2019boolq}         & English & Boolean QA        & Accuracy \\
MS MARCO~\cite{nguyen2016ms}        & English & Passage QA        & ROUGE-L \\
MGSM~\cite{shi2023language}         & Hindi   & Math reasoning    & Acc.\ (EM) \\
IndicQA~\cite{doddapaneni2023towards} & Hindi, Odia & Reading comp.\ & F1 \\
IndicSentiment~\cite{doddapaneni2023towards} & Hindi, Odia & Sentiment & Accuracy \\
\bottomrule
\end{tabular}
\end{table}
